content: Refactor ManagerDashboard.jsx to use canonicalData.js - remove demoData dependency, use CANONICAL_RESIDENTS, CANONICAL_PROPERTIES, PORTFOLIO_TOTALS
Refactor ManagerChurnRisk.jsx to use canonicalData.js - replace AT_RISK_RESIDENTS_WITH_SCORES and PROPERTIES with canonical data
Refactor ManagerResidents.jsx to use canonicalData.js - replace mockResidents with CANONICAL_RESIDENTS
Refactor ResidentDashboard.jsx to use ALEX_CHEN from canonicalData.js
Refactor ResidentConcierge.jsx to remove demoData dependency - use canonical data for services
Verify no remaining references to demoData.js in manager or resident pages
Test all Property Manager routes thoroughly - dashboard, churn-risk, residents, providers, maintenance
Test all Alex resident routes thoroughly - dashboard, concierge, services, bookings, maintenance
Cross-verify Alex Chen data consistency between Admin, Manager, and Resident views
Verify property names, metrics, and ROI values match across all experiences
